violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food boxes on floor in Walk-in-freezer need to be stored 6 inches off of floor.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Front handwashing sink needs towels.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment Soda dispenser that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.--Food contact surface Prep table next to oven under venthood was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-freezer holding frozen fries was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory in back by Bread/Bun storage was not kept clean or maintained.
